def positive_cast_applied_without_preceding_type_narrowing_guard():
    rule_id = "cast_applied_without_preceding_type_narrowing_guard"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "typing.cast applied to a value without a preceding isinstance or type narrowing check."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
